tier_definitions.FULL: Both API and frontend sources present; all params high confidence
tier_definitions.PARTIAL: One source only, or mix of confidence levels, or blob-only access
tier_definitions.BLIND: API function found but zero params extracted (pure blob passthrough)
tier_definitions.ARRAY_BODY: Body is an array of objects; required element fields detected, rest is open schema
tier_definitions.ORPHAN: Frontend calls endpoint but no Invoke-*.ps1 found
tier_definitions.STUB: No sources at all — sidecar-only documentation

probable_404s.note: Frontend calls this URL but no Invoke-AddCustomDomain.ps1 exists. In CIPP's single-entrypoint router, this returns 404 at runtime. Either the PS1 is missing, or the frontend URL is wrong.

note: blind_endpoints: API function found but zero params extracted. probable_404s: ORPHAN endpoints with active call sites — genuine runtime 404s in CIPP. orphan_delta.new: endpoints that became ORPHAN since last run — investigate immediately. sidecar_candidates = all endpoints without a sidecar that need one. type_inference_coverage.pct_typed: % params with a richer type than default 'string' — increases as sidecars and TYPE_HINTS improve.
